purpose.text: This process automates changing a customer's address by first verifying that the associated bank account is active, and only proceeding to update the account's status if that condition holds; it exists to prevent address changes being applied against accounts that are not in an active state.

inputs.name: AccountNumber
inputs.description: Identifier of the customer's account for which the address change is being processed.

inputs.name: NewAddress
inputs.description: The new address value supplied for the account.

outputs.name: Success
outputs.description: Flag indicating whether the account status update succeeded.
outputs.destination: Returned by process End stage to the calling process/system

business_rules.statement: Address changes require the account to be active before any update is performed.
When the account is active, the account status is set to 'Updated' as part of processing the address change.

exception_semantics.condition: The looked-up account status is not 'Active'.
exception_semantics.current_handling: The process throws a Business Exception with the detail 'Account not active', halting further processing.
